Dialog.name: MSG_737_1_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 1 0 5}All right, let me tell you about a new tactic called "Shifting."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_737_1_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 2 0 5}When you knock an enemy down, Shifting allows you to leverage that opening to let someone else take action.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_737_1_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 3 0 5}Once you do, your offense can follow up with whoever you passed your action to.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_737_1_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 4 0 5}If you can coordinate well with your team, you'll be able to claim victory with even greater efficiency.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_737_1_5
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 5 0 5}You should all be experienced enough to pull this off now. Go ahead and give it a try.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_737_1_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You are able to Shift your own "1 More" action to another teammate. Press the L2 button to pass your action to someone else and navigate battles more effectively.[n]{f 1 1}
